title: Mission to Fest (Galactic Civil War)
content:

|objective=Obtain samples of metal testing<ref name="Dark Forces" />
|date=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]<ref name="Madine">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}} places the outbreak of the [[Candorian plague/Legends|Candorian plague]] on [[Dentaal]] on 36:2:12, which falls in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. {{FactFile|130|MAD 1-4|General Crix Madine}} tie together the events of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' and [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']], and Madine's own recollections in [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] as follows: upon learning of the [[Dark Trooper Project]], Madine alerts the Rebel Alliance to the project's existence, thus starting the events of ''Dark Forces''. Shortly afterwards, Madine is ordered to release the Candorian plague on Dentaal, an event which is dated to 36:2:12 per the Adventure Journal. Madine vanishes into the wilderness shortly afterwards, spending a week in the jungles of Dentaal before escaping and fleeing the planet—only to be captured almost immediately by General [[Rom Mohc]] and imprisoned on [[Orinackra]]. Kyle Katarn then frees Madine from Orinackra, and Madine is then involved in the [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|battle]] at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' states that only a short amount of time passed between Madine telling the Alliance about the Dark Troopers and his defection. The length of time Madine spends on the run places his capture and imprisonment on Orinackra firmly in the month 36:3, or the first month of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Therefore, the events of ''Dark Forces'' prior to the [[mission to Orinackra]] fall in 0 ABY, and the remainder of the game and the battle at Corellia both occur in 1 ABY.</ref>

{{Quote|If something called the dark trooper actually exists, there must be evidence of it somewhere. But the universe is a big place, and there's not much time to look. Fest could be a wild goose chase—but do I have any choice?|[[Kyle Katarn]]|<ref name="Dark Forces Official Player's Guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>}}
During his investigation on the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|Dark troopers]], then-mercenary [[Kyle Katarn]] '''visited''' a [[Weapons Research Facility]] on [[Fest/Legends|Fest]] in order to collect more clues on their production.

After Katarn captured [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Rebus (Galactic Empire)|Rebus]], he proved reluctant in his interrogation but mentioned something about 'test results on the planet Fest'. Defected Imperial agent [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] confirmed the existence of a facility on the planet doing metallurgical research. [[Jan Ors]], who led Katarn's campaign, decided that analyzing the samples would help the alliance to trace the origins of the project.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|—you shoulda' seen the results of our tests on Fest—my weapons are gonna put a lot of holes in a lot of Rebel scum.|[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Rebus (Galactic Empire)|Rebus]] under interrogation|<ref name="Dark Forces" />}}
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] became aware of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] weapons project known as the [[Dark Trooper Project]]. As part of the effort to derail the project, Alliance operative [[Kyle Katarn]] was dispatched to the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]] where he captured [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Rebus (Galactic Empire)|Rebus]], the designer of the prototype weapons to be used in the Imperial project. Under interrogation, Rebus revealed testing had occurred on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fest/Legends|Fest]].<ref name="Dark Forces" /> Located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]],<ref name="The Essential Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Fest was home to an Imperial [[Weapons Research Facility]]; its existence was confirmed for the Rebels by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], an Imperial with Rebel sympathizers. The Alliance decided that any data from the testing facility would be of use in defeating the Dark Troopers.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

Rebel operative [[Jan Ors]] briefed Kyle Katarn on the mission, although she gave him a large degree of leeway in exactly how to conduct it. The Weapons Facility on Fest was built deep under large rock outcroppings with a strongly defended entrance guarded against frontal assault.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

==The mission==
{{Gamemechanics}}
===Entering the Weapons Facility===
Katarn was flown to the planet Fest by Ors in the [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' and dropped on a narrow ledge overlooking a ravine. Following the ledge, Katarn emerged into a large clearing occupied by several [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] led by an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]]. Eliminating the Imperial force, Katarn followed an upward path that climbed through the cliffs eventually emerging above a large courtyard which contained a large multi-story building and a sizable door set into the cliff face. Katarn dropped down to the courtyard, engaging a unit of stormtroopers on parade, and, avoiding the main entrance, climbed a staircase built into the cliff face. After investigating a small tower at the top of the staircase, Katarn found a hole that enabled him to drop behind the door.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

Inside this facility, Katarn neutralized several Imperial staff before activating controls that opened the entrance to main Weapons Facility.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

===Investigating the Facility===
Among the forces Katarn encountered, there was an Imperial Officer who held a code card. With it, Kyle was able to reach the classified section of the facility where [[Phrik/Legends|phrik]] alloys were tested. By controlling a complexly controlled rotating bridge, he managed to gain access to a cylindrical platform where a case with an alloy was.

Kyle was unable to take the same route back to his ship. He traversed the dangerous testing room and reached the proper front entrance of the facility. Gaining access to the gate controls, he returned to the rocky landscape and finally to his ship
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
There is an Easter egg in this mission: The player can find a secret room with a secret door, holding a chained [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]].
